year_one.description: A full-year literature study for high school (9–12) pairing Shakespeare's Macbeth with Brontë's Wuthering Heights, built around the DELIGHT framework and the Great Conversation.

bundle.label: Complete Year One Bundle
bundle.title: Macbeth + Wuthering Heights
bundle.subtitle: High School (9–12) — Both Semesters
bundle.description: Everything you need for a complete year of Charlotte Mason literature — both full-semester units at a bundle price.
includes: Student weekly handouts for both units
Reading companion for each major work

units.title: Macbeth
units.author: William Shakespeare
units.description: A full-semester unit on ambition, power, and moral order — rooted in Charlotte Mason narration and the DELIGHT framework.

units.title: Wuthering Heights
units.author: Emily Brontë
units.description: A full-semester unit exploring ordered and disordered love, Romantic philosophy, and the moral imagination — through narration and living discussion.
